name: dx-webdev
description: Personal DevExtreme jQuery web development helpers for pure HTML/JS/CSS apps.

interface.shortDescription: DevExtreme jQuery helpers for HTML, JS, and CSS apps.
interface.longDescription: Focused personal helpers for generating and reviewing pure HTML, JavaScript, and CSS pages that use DevExtreme jQuery widgets with local styling and validation guidance.
defaultPrompt: Generate a DevExtreme jQuery page from a spec.
Map this UX intent to DevExtreme widgets.
